articles.description: Following the launch of the first spot XRP exchange-traded fund (ETF), two artificial intelligence (AI) models are predicting the asset could surpass $5 by the end of 2025. Brazil introduced the world’s first spot XRP product, XRPH11, which began trading on April 25 on B3, the country’s main stock exchange.
